# Keep Your Car in Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Guide [2026] - Keep My Car
> Can you keep your car in bankruptcy? Learn exemptions, reaffirmation, redemption, and cramdown strategies for Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 in 2026.

## About
keepmycarinbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Behind on Car Payments? How Bankruptcy Can Help | keepmycarinbankruptcy.com - Keep My Car: https://keepmycarinbankruptcy.com/behind-on-payments.html
- Vehicle Exemptions by State - Protect Your Car in Bankruptcy | keepmycarinbankruptcy.com - Keep My Car: https://keepmycarinbankruptcy.com/car-exemptions.html
